calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Mar-30-2009 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Mar-30-2009 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Comm: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Linda Forster, CSR #13286.

Elizabeth McDonald, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Capital One Bank (USA), N.A.
No appearance by defendant Karly L. Davis.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on December 18, 2008.
Doe defendants were dismissed wihtout prejudice today, March 30, 2009.
Plaintiff's Trial Brief was filed today, March 30, 2009.
Declaration of Richard Napolitano in Lieu of Personal Testimony at Trial was filed today, March 30, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Capital One Bank (USA), N.A., and against defendant Karly L. Davis as follows:

Principal - $1,015.39.
Interest - $164.64.
Attorney's Fees - 400.00.
Costs - $240.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $1,820.03.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-18-2008 Set For Trial On Mar-30-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
